properties.description: Power behind the throne — practically controlling the country. Blocking Pezeshkian's intelligence minister appointment. Major disagreements with president. Only IRGC commanders have direct communication with Mojtaba Khamenei.

properties.detail: USS Spruance intercepted sanctioned Iranian cargo ship Touska. Fired on engine room after 6 hours of warnings. CENTCOM confirms ship under US Treasury sanctions for prior illegal activity. Trump announced on Truth Social. Iran calls it 'armed piracy and theft' and threatens retaliation.

IRNA reports Iran will not participate in second round of Pakistan-mediated talks. Reasons cited: 'excessive demands', 'unrealistic expectations', continued US blockade. Trump still sending Witkoff/Kushner to Islamabad (arriving Monday night). Vance skipping — Trump cites 'security concerns'.
Trump accused Iran of 'total violation' of ceasefire on Truth Social Sunday morning. Combined with threat to destroy infrastructure.
US preparing global seizure operations on Iranian-linked ships within days. Extends beyond Hormuz to worldwide. 23 ships turned back so far. Pentagon-disclosed named operation.

Israel established 10km 'Yellow Line' military zone in southern Lebanon. 55 villages off-limits. 'Gaza model replicated in Lebanon.' IDF razing villages during ceasefire, blowing up homes in Haneen. 40,000+ homes destroyed or damaged. At least 773 killed, 2000+ wounded since ceasefire started.
WTI +7% to $89.74, Brent +5.8% to $95.59. Driven by Touska seizure and complete Hormuz shipping halt. Goldman Sachs raised forecast to $110 if closure persists.

Released audio of crew member: 'You gave me clearance to go. My name is second on your list. You are firing now. Let me turn back.' Second ship Jag Arnav (from Saudi Arabia's al-Jubail) also attacked. Sanmar Herald was carrying ~2 million barrels of Iraqi crude to India.
No tankers passed through Strait of Hormuz on Sunday April 19. Lloyd's List confirms total halt. One of quietest days since conflict began. Both US blockade and IRGC restrictions contribute.

Trump threatened to 'knock out every single Power Plant, and every single Bridge, in Iran' unless they accept deal. Posted on Truth Social Sunday morning. Iran dismissed as 'empty bluster'. EU expressed alarm.
Ghalibaf: 'impossible for others to pass Hormuz while we cannot.' Also: 'progress' in talks 'but many gaps and fundamental points remain.' 'Still far from final discussion.'

properties.action_apr19: Announced Touska seizure on Truth Social. Accused Iran of 'total violation' of ceasefire. Threatened to destroy every power plant and bridge in Iran. Sending Witkoff/Kushner to Islamabad despite Iran rejection. Cited 'security concerns' for Vance absence.
Warned of 'decisive response' to Touska seizure. Controls Iran under Vahidi's command. Continues Hormuz restrictions. Blocks civilian government appointments.
Continues to be marginalized. IRGC tightens grip on diplomatic strategy. Sidelined after 'idiot' incident.
'Impossible for others to pass Hormuz while we cannot.' Acknowledged progress but 'many gaps remain.' 'Still far from final discussion.'
Established 10km 'Yellow Line' in Lebanon. 55 villages off-limits. Razing villages during ceasefire. 40,000+ homes destroyed. 773 killed, 2000+ wounded since ceasefire.

properties.status_apr19: Complete halt — zero tanker transits on Sunday. Both US blockade and IRGC restrictions in effect. One of quietest days since conflict began.

properties.action_apr19: Demands accountability after Sanmar Herald audio proves ship had clearance before being fired upon. Jag Arnav also attacked.
Intelligence minister appointment blocked by Vahidi. Increasingly seen as figurehead. Major disagreements with IRGC Commander-in-Chief.
Largely inaccessible. Only IRGC commanders have direct communication. Civilian officials have no direct access.

properties.status_apr19: Expires April 23 — 4 days remaining. Iran rejects second round talks. Trump accuses Iran of 'total violation'. Prospects for renewal slim.
